title: EvaluateResponse
description: Wire response returned by POST /v1-evaluate. Every decision (allow/deny/hold/escalate) is returned as a 200 body; non-2xx responses carry an ErrorResponse instead.

decision.description: Canonical execution-time decision. Only `allow` permits execution.

request_id.description: Echo of the caller-supplied idempotency key, or a server-generated UUID when none was supplied.

mode.description: `live` when the decision was recorded and (on allow) a permit was issued; `shadow` when only evaluated.

cache_hit.description: true iff the decision was served from the server-side decision cache.

evaluation_ms.description: Server-side evaluation wall-clock time in milliseconds.

permit_token.description: Single-use permit token. Present iff decision=='allow' and mode=='live'.

fingerprint.description: Stable hash of (rules, actor, context) used for decision caching.

risk_score.description: Optional numeric risk score produced by the rule engine.

rollout.description: Rollout bucketing metadata when progressive delivery is configured.

shadow.description: Shadow decision emitted when the bundle declares a shadow rule set.

trace.description: Per-rule evaluation trace. Present iff the request set `explain: true`.

audit_entry_hash.description: SHA-256 of the audit chain entry written for this evaluation.

idempotent_replay.description: true when the same request_id was already recorded and this response is a replay.
